visual_description: The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score. A close-up, out-of-focus shot with a greenish-blue tint slowly sharpens, revealing the face of an older man. He has a shaved head and a serious, contemplative expression. The background is a blur of green and blue tones, suggesting an indoor environment. In the top right corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera pulls back to a medium shot, showing the man from behind. He is wearing a dark suit jacket and stands with his back to the camera, looking intently at a row of aquariums. The aquariums are filled with water, gravel, and various aquatic plants, with fish swimming inside. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, casting a cool, greenish hue over the entire scene. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner. The music is slow and atmospheric, creating a sense of quiet tension and anticipation, as if building up to a significant or mysterious moment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the foreboding music to dominate the soundscape.
